scripts.build:react: npm run build -w @phoenix/react && npm run build -w @phoenix/react-ssr && npm run build -w @phoenix/vite
scripts.build:ssr: npm run build:react && npm run build:ssr -w phoenix-blog-react-example
scripts.test:react: npm run test -w @phoenix/react && npm run test -w @phoenix/react-ssr && npm run test -w @phoenix/vite && npm run test -w phoenix-blog-react-example
